ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station (number of bikes) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the station */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone where the station is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of the bike (e.g., standard, electric) */,
  "current_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike is currently located */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bike (e.g., available, in use, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the bike was purchased */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level for electric bikes */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Total distance traveled by the bike */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_current_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's payment method */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the program */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the user for frequent use */,
  "preferred_payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_preferred_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the payment method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., credit card, debit card) */,
  "card_number" TEXT /* Card number (masked for security) */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the card */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the payment method */,
  "default_payment_method" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the user's default payment method */,
  "card_holder_name" TEXT /* Name of the card holder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike rented */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the rental started */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the rental ended */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rental started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rental ended */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the rental */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Any discount applied to the rental */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the rental experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine check, repair) */,
  "issues_found" TEXT /* Description of any issues found during maintenance */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* List of parts replaced during maintenance */,
  "cost_of_maintenance" REAL /* Cost incurred for the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the technician */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the technician (e.g., mechanical, electrical) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the technician was hired */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training */,
  "specialization_level" TEXT /* Level of specialization (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals at the station */,
  "average_rental_duration" REAL /* Average duration of rentals at the station */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of rentals at the station */,
  "bikes_in_station" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently in the station */,
  "bikes_out_station" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently out of the station */,
  "total_bikes_repaired" INTEGER /* Total number of bikes repaired at the station */,
  "total_user_feedbacks" INTEGER /* Total number of user feedbacks for the station */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for the station */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Hours of the day with the highest usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_metrics_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station related to the feedback */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike related to the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, suggestion) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)
